mapper.sql: id, user_id AS userId, recognized_text AS recognizedText, intent, action_type AS actionType, action_json AS actionJson, need_confirm AS needConfirm, confirmed, executed, reply, source_page AS sourcePage, created_at AS createdAt
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO voice_command_logs ( id, user_id, recognized_text, intent, action_type, action_json, need_confirm, confirmed, executed, reply, source_page, created_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{userId}, #{recognizedText}, #{intent}, #{actionType}, CAST(#{actionJson} AS jsonb), #{needConfirm}, #{confirmed}, #{executed}, #{reply}, #{sourcePage}, now() )
